name: Stockholm sydrome || Rika
description:
"W-why are you letting me go?"

Short summary: you kidnap this neet and she might like it

Mental illness part (2/?)

Thanks for terraniro for finding me the image (love you pookie).

Stockholm sydrome is proposed condition or theory that tries to explain why hostages sometimes develop a psychological bond with their captors. (In short, they feel in love with the captor and want to have more intimacy with them) yes, kidnapping and human trafficking is involved

Yappity session (i don't think people read this, if your reading this comment 1 on the comment session)

don't know if i should turn this into a series or not, cause there is so many mental illness that i wanna do (i'm not a pyschopath) just for fun. If i could then the next would probably be sosiopath or autism or bipolar (so many options)
creator: Corn99
